meta.title: CreateWebPlace | Professional websites & online stores — design, build, launch
meta.description: CreateWebPlace designs and builds fast, credible websites and online stores — from structure and UX to publish, SEO, hosting and integrations. Launch a site that earns enquiries.
meta.keywords: website builder agency, professional websites, web design, ecommerce Serbia, Croatia, SEO, hosting

hero.subtitle: Website design & launch
hero.h1: Build a polished website your customers trust — engineered to load fast and convert.
hero.subline: We design, develop and publish business sites and shops: clear positioning, credible visuals, measurable performance — not templates that look like everyone else.
hero.badge_web_sub: Design → QA → publish — end to end.
hero.portrait_alt: Creative professional collaborating on a website launch

services.h2: End‑to‑end website creation — and the growth toolkit around it
services.card1_p: Messaging, UX, visuals and codebase aligned to one goal — a site visitors understand in seconds and search engines can crawl with confidence.
services.card1_alt: Developer working on a web platform
services.card2_p: When you need deeper UX than pages alone — mobile‑first interfaces aligned with your site and brand, so every touch feels consistent.
services.footer_p_intro: The full spectrum in one roadmap —
services.footer_p_mid: a strategic order for what pays off first

gb.subtitle: Google & local visibility
gb.h2: Stand out on Google Search and Maps
gb.card1_html: We help companies and trades set up and run a polished Google Business Profile: accurate categories, service area, creatives and messaging that prompts calls — not vanity metrics.
gb.card1_li1: High visibility on Maps with queries where you genuinely compete (“near me”, service names…).
gb.card1_li2: Tied into your website and Local SEO when you widen the radius.
gb.card2_kicker: What people see before your site
gb.card2_html: Your Business Profile often appears before your site — hours, phone, directions, offerings, reviews. We shape and maintain it with messaging that earns trust.
gb.card2_li1: Reviews and replies that build reputation — not stats for spreadsheets.
gb.card2_li2: Imagery and service copy that feel handcrafted, never generic.

auto_sec.subtitle: Beyond launch
auto_sec.h2: Your website stays useful after publish — structured content and calm operations
auto_sec.lead: We build the site — then optionally wire editorial cadences, enquiries, scheduling and measurable reporting so leads do not evaporate inside inboxes.
auto_sec.c1_t: Editorial plans that reinforce your positioning
auto_sec.c1_html: Your site deserves fresh proof — case studies, service pages and answers to the questions prospects already ask on calls. We set the structure, tone and cadence so updates feel consistent (and search engines see motion, not a frozen brochure).
auto_sec.c1_li1: Topics pulled from real FAQs — not generic filler articles.
auto_sec.c1_li2: Keyword intent without awkward stuffing — copy humans still enjoy reading.
auto_sec.c2_html: Web forms and booking flows can quietly replace chaos: one calendar, confirmations, reminders and lightweight automations after the visit — especially useful for salons, trades and consultation studios.
auto_sec.c2_li1: Form submit: you are notified, the client gets a confirmation — typed once.
auto_sec.c2_li2: Polite review prompts right after a great experience.
auto_sec.stack_eyebrow: What you get with the website
auto_sec.stack_title: A production-ready site — plus optional systems that protect your time
auto_sec.stack_lead: Every engagement starts with a clear website outcome: structure, design, performance and launch. When you are ready, we connect the operational layer (enquiries, content rhythm, lightweight automation) so the site keeps paying rent.
auto_sec.stack_item1_desc: Custom layout, messaging hierarchy and reusable components — not a stock template that vaguely resembles competitors.
auto_sec.stack_item2_title: Performance that shows up on mobile
auto_sec.stack_item2_desc: Fast loads and crisp layouts reduce bounce rates and support SEO — especially for local searches and paid traffic landing pages.
auto_sec.stack_item3_desc: Forms route to inbox or CRM templates, confirmations to clients, receipts you can audit — fewer lost threads.
auto_sec.stack_item4_desc: Technical SEO baseline, sensible metadata and (when relevant) GBP alignment so Google understands who you serve.
auto_sec.stack_item5_desc: Understand which pages and channels create leads — so you reinvest confidently instead of guessing.
auto_sec.stack_cta_line: Budget-aware engagements — transparency over hype. Schedule a focused website consult

testimonials.subtitle: Trust
testimonials.mj_quote: CreateWebPlace’s professionalism is rare. Sites load well under one second and conversions visibly improved.
testimonials.as_quote: Clear communications, timelines respected, pixel-perfect interpretation of the brief.
testimonials.fn_quote: We hunted a dependable web & SEO ally for ages — now measurements and traction are unmistakable.

about.subtitle: About
about.p: We’re more than contractors — we’re your website execution partner from information architecture through launch hygiene. Every pixel is accountable to clarity, speed and measurable enquiries.

meta.title: Services | CreateWebPlace — Comprehensive digital programmes
meta.description: From premium web UX and ecommerce to SEO, GEO, ads, Maps, graphic design and digital menus.

usluge.hero_p: From design through optimisation and hosting — one partner for sustained online traction.
usluge.b1_p1: We architect digital ecosystems that feel premium yet convert — informed by behavioural research.
usluge.b1_p2: Information architecture trims bounce rates and reinforces intent-based journeys.
usluge.b2_p1: Composable storefronts tuned for carts, fulfilment signals and flawless mobile checkout.
usluge.b2_p2: m-commerce optimised with instrumentation you can steer by.
usluge.b3_p1: Technical audits, authoritative content and topical authority stitched to revenue keywords.
usluge.b3_p2: Algorithms shift — we sprint the marathon beside you.
usluge.b4_p1: GBP optimisation, citations, geo landing pages tuned for transactional intent.
usluge.b4_p2: Own the SERP neighbourhoods that actually pay rent.
usluge.b5_p1: Entity graphs, schemas and conversational prompts surfaced to ChatGPT-era discovery.
usluge.b5_p2: Tomorrow’s citations start with today’s structuring.
usluge.b6_p1: NVMe, CDN-backed stacks guarded by pragmatic SRE drills.
usluge.b6_p2: Peace of mind on backups, TLS and patching.
usluge.b7_p1: Audience intelligence, creatives and landing synergy built for repeatable ROI.
usluge.b8_p1: Ranking factors unpacked into execution on listings, imagery, attributes and QA.
usluge.b8_p2: Reviews and entity validation without theatrics.
usluge.b9_p1: Distinctive palettes, typography systems and tactile assets that scale channel-to-channel.
usluge.b9_p2: Strategy-led artistry that still sells SKUs.
usluge.b10_p1: QR-first hospitality menus with instantaneous price or dish updates.
usluge.proc_lead: Transparent engineering cadence that de-risks delivery.
usluge.s1_p: We stress-test goals, audiences and constraints before pixels move.
usluge.s2_p: High-fidelity UI paired with interactive prototypes.
usluge.s3_p: Clean code, performance budgets, security sweeps on every device class.
usluge.s4_p: We stay embedded for iteration, analytics and scale.
usluge.faq1_q: How long does a typical site take?
usluge.faq1_a: Marketing sites often land in 2–3 weeks; complex platforms can span 6–12 weeks depending on integrations.
usluge.faq2_a: Yes — retainers include security updates, monitoring and measured improvements.
usluge.faq3_a: Every launch includes foundational technical SEO; larger programmes stack content & authority work.

o-nama.p2: We refuse “just pushing code”; we dismantle friction with architecture.
